item.title: Monday Summer Meme dump to help you trough the heat wave (no politics)
item.description:
1. American are asleep, upvote superior European culture
2. Heart attack in 3, 2, 1
3
4
5. Or about wolves
6. When you play as a fried potato
7, Mark slipped...
8. Everybodyyyy
9
10. This is how to live carefree
11. Poor cat
12
13. It's OVER
14. Mom with the superior meme
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's tone and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. Here is an inspiration quote within the game! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a happy week, gang!

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Really freaking depressing
item.description: So after buying my family a roast dinner my eldest brother decided to take the opportunity to tell me how much he hates me because I’m trans. I just wanted to spend time with my family because I’ve been feeling down and now I just feel worse. Just wanted to say thank you to everyone for the supportive messages.
item.dc:creator: Mohx77

i like both? greetings online friends
better than on the seats?
it definitely is
now that is art
looks like Two-Face
we need a new bill to spice things up
it's a chess-ire cat
sure could go for some cocaine right now
mmm hmm
accurate
probably not the first candy i'd pick but they are really good
funny that they are in Plant City
sure why not
i knew that
nope
totally
think i'm going Alfredo
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I hope he has pants on!
item.description: Even if he hasn’t, I agree with the sentiment.
item.dc:creator: mercbrit

item.title: When I got invited to a stranger's wedding after helping him at a bus stop.
item.description: Last year around June/July: Waiting at bus stop, stranger asks if I know when the bus is coming. He tells me he arrived last night from Sweden, he does not have mobile internet. We get on the bus, I tell him how to activate his sim, which bus stop he should get off to buy charging converters and also give him my number if he needs help. He tells me he is here to meet his girlfriend and her family. Few weeks later, he invites me to his wedding. I go there as one of two from groom side other than his cousin. This was like a movie, getting invited to a random stranger's wedding whom I met while I am on my way to office.
item.dc:creator: yummycoot

item.title: In VS Out of Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— I had an appearance at a local comic expo today and then went out to dinner with my family after, which inspired me to do this little side by side. Can’t take credit here: suit, cape, and bracers (not pictured) made by jcurtis_atelier, mask and belt from Etsy.
Here’s a bonus pic, cause I didn’t have the gloves+bracers on in the other one.

Not sure what I'm supposed to do at this point... I guess if anyone wants a good book to read, here's the first novel I self-published - Torn Asunder: https://a.co/d/0iekIqCA

item.title: We Found A Wall Safe Part 2: The Opening!
item.description:
A month ago I posted on Reddit that we found a wall safe. Today I worked on cracking it! Big thanks to @MBSAFCRKR for the remote assistance.
Woot! Combo: 10-20-41
Damn! Empty.
Wait, what's that!?
Hmmmm
Buried treasure perhaps?
Double damn! Thanks everyone! Update: The previous owner, from many years ago was a Dr. I'm pretty sure I discovered Dr Feel Goods vintage stash of heroin. Fruit powder or drugs. Which would you put in a safe?
item.dc:creator: PunkRoth

item.title: Not only dogs have problems. Not all illnesses are visible.
item.description: It's time for my annual reminder that many veterans suffer from sound sensitive PTSD. Fireworks can trigger an episode. Please keep that in mind before lighting off anything near homes. Edit: wow, my first time going viral. Be safe everyone. I use Sony active noise cancelling over ear headphones. They're amazing. (originally posted by @WitchCityHound on 2023-07-02 02:37:08)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: It’s been stressful
item.description: TLDR: My brain is mush and stuck in flight mode. A dude tried to follow me home a few days ago and I needed a place to vent about it. Happy Sunday, I hope you’re doing well. I ended up being gone longer than I would’ve liked but honestly my motivation for music has been so slim until recently due to so many life changes. I’ve also had some big scares since I’ve lived in the apartment I do now. This is one of few accounts I have where no family are connected where I can actually talk about certain things, but someone tried to follow me home recently. I’ve been trying to find ways to get in person self defense training and I’ve been saving up for a mace/pepper launcher but those are on preorder and Im still a smidge away. I replaced my mace just in case and if you have any good recs for outdoor cameras, let me know. I have no clue who the man was. When I first got to the gas station, I thought he was an old friend from a distance who also goes there. I got close enough to realize it wasn’t and didn’t pay him anymore attention. I paid for my stuff and was talking to the cashier when he walked in staring at us. I left the parking lot when I noticed he’d been yelling at me, he ran up to me and asked if I had $1. I didn’t because I only brought what I needed so I apologized and kept walking. He was so quiet and I couldn’t see him beside me so when I crossed the road to head over to my apartment, I had NO CLUE he’d also crossed and followed me until some old men started yelling at him to leave me alone because they’d watched him. They stopped me and told me they were just looking out for me, I told them I appreciated it and had no clue who he was. He’d been going around asking people for money all night apparently. The owner doesn’t know who he is either. He’s been coming in and buying beer but was always short and that’s why he was asking for money. I said “that still doesn’t explain WHY he followed me…” which is a big question for me. The owner thinks he works at one of the other gas stations in the area so he alerted all their owners and the cashier said she’d take me home if I ever came in late. So I’ve been focusing on what to do next and getting into contact with different people to move forward with learning what I need to. What I learned in Voc Rehab just isn’t enough so I’ve been having to chill out from that and readjust in some ways. I don’t do guns for a variety of reasons, I mostly don’t think I could handle the pure shock alone of ever having to use one so a high impact mace ball is fine by me and that’s why I’ve decided to go with the mace launcher. I’ve not seen him since but Im not taking chance now that I live alone especially.
item.dc:creator: SursieMetzger

item.title: If it works
item.dc:creator: Fanner50

item.title: Trying to help my sister.
item.description: Hello people of Imgur. I’m making this post using my sister’s account, with her permission. She is pictured above. She’s informed me that a few people bother to keep up with her on here, and that it’s a lovely community. I’ve watched my sister endure a lengthy, debilitating battle with vasculitis. Multiple of her organs have been affected- and seemingly out of nowhere, her bowel is acutely sick. Excess bleeding internally and externally left her terribly anemic. She’s been in the hospital a few days now. She’s staying with me, but we have limited resources and no semblance of family support. Some help would be really appreciated as I am also now housing Emily’s pet rats, who mean so so much to her. We are definitely not out of the woods and are going to have to look into around the clock care being available at home, so she doesn’t have to be in some facility without her rats. I included some of her art also in this post. Anyways, if anyone is able to help, here are the payment options. I am on Em’s phone (like I said, with permission) and she has granted me access. PayPal: Sillygooseincorporated69@gmail.com or @sillygooseinc Venmo: @Emily-Lam-17 Cashapp: $litigiousGoose And thank you for reading, and any support or well wishes.
item.dc:creator: cantw82D1E

item.title: 'Borrow mine'
item.dc:creator: MangoWoodDesk

item.title: Stay Safe In The Water, Friends!
item.description: Be seen, wear a life jacket, never swim alone, and don't overestimate your swimming ability I don't want to watch one of my lifeguard coworkers pull another child out of the water and do CPR on them Again They lived, but it was horrible to witness
item.dc:creator: EmeraldLight

item.description: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salp
item.dc:creator: AccidentalSharting

item.title: F me I guess
item.description: My parents have never visited me after I moved away 16 years ago (just 4 hours away) other than my wedding and they never even came to my house just the wedding. I've since divorced and moved out, got a new house a couple months ago, and they moved about 13 hours away. They came up this weekend to see my brother but couldn't even be bothered to come visit my m or see my new house. They even brought stuff for me but left it with my brother for me to go get. My mom text me this morning wishing me Happy birthday, and that they were driving home today. Really couldn't a couple more hours to your trip?? And they wonder why I don't call them on.
item.dc:creator: Nachocuban

item.title: Get sproingy
item.dc:creator: MangoWoodDesk

item.title: Early Evening Thirst: Take One, Action!
item.description:
Tonight's theme is thirsty shots that ONLY have ONE SINGLE VERSION. That's right; this pose has NO OTHER EDITS. Just the one Doom Girl. Source: https://www.deviantart.com/themaestronoob/art/Doo-Mgirl-820606856
And this totally unique Tali'zorah! Definitely no sexy edits! Source: https://www.artstation.com/artwork/a2qyk
Captain Amelia, truly a woman like no other, with no other pics! Source: https://www.deviantart.com/themaestronoob/art/Captain-Amelia-947753510
And after all those women of action, we have a woman of science! Purah is a brilliant woman who absolutely wouldnt have an alternate outfit! Source: https://x.com/TheMaestroNoob/status/1696473276674101378
And last but not least, a lady Stormtrooper! Check out that custom-made armor! There can't be a SINGLE other version of that recruitment poster. Source: https://www.artstation.com/artwork/k4ZWnn All works are by TheMaestroNoob. Browse their work with caution. - - - - - Women of action are dynamic and powerful, rarely found in one place or pose for long. Who's a woman of action that you admire? Like Tali'zorah, are there any other non-human women you'd love to see posts of? Most Viral Edit: Is there a theme, outfit, or artist you'd like to see in one of my future posts? Let me know!
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life
